mapper.select: SELECT * FROM oc_order_line WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND order_line_id = #{orderLineId}
SELECT * FROM oc_order_product WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND order_line_id = #{orderLineId}
SELECT * FROM oc_order_product_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND prod_item_id = #{prodItemId}
SELECT * FROM oc_order_element_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND element_item_id = #{elementItemId}
SELECT user_diff_code FROM tf_f_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT u.* FROM tf_f_user u JOIN tf_f_user_relation r ON u.user_id = r.user_id_b WHERE r.rsrv_value = CAST(#{userId} AS CHAR) AND r.rsrv_value_code = 'citinet_grp_user_id' AND r.end_date > NOW()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oc_order_line (order_id, order_line_id, serial_number, sn_user_id, trade_type_code, line_level, parent_serial_number, srd, net_type_code, scene_type) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{orderLineId}, #{serialNumber}, #{snUserId}, #{tradeTypeCode}, #{lineLevel}, #{parentSerialNumber}, #{srd}, #{netTypeCode}, #{sceneType})
INSERT INTO oc_order_product (order_id, order_line_id, prod_item_id, product_id, product_type_code) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{orderLineId}, #{prodItemId}, #{productId}, #{productTypeCode})
INSERT INTO oc_order_product_item (order_id, prod_item_id, attr_code, attr_value) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{prodItemId}, #{attrCode}, #{attrValue})
INSERT INTO oc_order_element (order_id, order_line_id, element_item_id, prod_item_id, element_id) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{orderLineId}, #{elementItemId}, #{prodItemId}, #{elementId})
INSERT INTO oc_order_element_item (order_id, element_item_id, attr_code, attr_value) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{elementItemId}, #{attrCode}, #{attrValue})
